You can use either a Hash Set or a Trie to solve this problem.

If using a Set, sort the array of words so that shorter words are evaluated first. For each word, if its prefix (word minus the last character) is in the HashSet, then insert this word into the HashSet because it is valid.

If using a Trie, insert all words into a Trie. Then perform a Depth First Search (DFS) or Breadth First Search (BFS) starting from the root to find the deepest node where every node along the path is a complete word.
